overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration through Night City's dense urban environment. The player walks through a mix of elevated walkways, narrow alleys, and busy commercial streets filled with neon signage, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture under clear morning skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: turning left away from pedestrian crosswalk onto ascending path
beginning ascent up concrete ramp with metal railings

agents.ego_description: walking forward under the overpass then turning left to ascend a concrete ramp

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating shadow over the walkway
unusual green painted concrete pedestrian surface with yellow markings
bright yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the ground
industrial metal garbage containers with warning labels
rusted orange metal safety railings along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Starting under a massive concrete highway overpass with green painted pavement, the player turns left from a pedestrian crossing and begins ascending a ramp. A single pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction as the environment transitions from covered to more open elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated back alley with corrugated metal barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow elevated walkway past trash and metal sheds

entered.detail: rusted corrugated metal sheets forming walls and fences along the path
numerous black garbage bags piled against the walls
rectangular concrete planter box with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow, cluttered elevated walkway enclosed by corrugated metal barriers and piles of trash bags. The space feels confined and utilitarian with concrete surfaces and no visible pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with hotel signage and seating

events.description: descending concrete stairs from elevated walkway to street level
entering busier commercial area with pedestrians and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into a pedestrian plaza with benches and groups of people

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near benches, some sitting and conversing

entered.detail: large red and blue neon sign reading 'HOテル' (Hotel) on building facade
wide concrete staircase descending to street level
concrete and metal public seating along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Descending stairs into a more open pedestrian plaza featuring the prominent Japanese 'HOテル' neon sign. Several pedestrians are visible sitting on benches or standing in groups as the environment transitions from the cluttered back alley to a commercial street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with neon signage and overhead cables

events.description: crossing the street while vehicles pass by on the road
turning right at intersection to continue along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk and crossing the street amidst traffic and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: cars driving along the street and stopping at intersections

entered.detail: dense crisscrossing network of power lines and cables overhead
multiple vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements on building facades
dense urban architecture with mixed residential and commercial use

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling commercial street lined with vibrant neon billboards and crisscrossed by overhead electrical wires. The player crosses the street amidst moderate traffic while surrounded by dense urban architecture and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved ascending ramp with graffiti walls

events.description: turning right onto a curved ramp ascending between buildings
continuing ascent up the winding ramp with city views opening up

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking up a curved ramp with metal guard rails

entered.detail: winding paved ramp ascending to higher elevation with red curb markings
building wall covered in bright pink and yellow graffiti art with neon lighting
silver metal safety railings along the curved ramp edge

segments.scene_description: Turning right onto a curved ramp that ascends between buildings, featuring bright pink neon graffiti on the walls and metal guard rails. The path climbs higher, offering changing perspectives of the surrounding cityscape with no other pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated panoramic viewpoint overlooking downtown skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway observing the panoramic city views and distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with large holographic advertisements near the top
multi-level highway ramps and overpasses winding through the city
giant digital advertisement screen displaying red and white graphics

segments.scene_description: Reaching a high vantage point with panoramic views of the city skyline, featuring massive holographic advertisements on distant mega-towers, complex elevated highway interchanges, and sprawling urban density under bright morning sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins in the shadowed depths of a concrete underpass and ascends toward a panoramic vista of the city skyline. It begins by turning from a green-painted pedestrian crossing to climb a ramp, moving from the covered overpass into a confined, utilitarian walkway enclosed by corrugated metal and piles of trash. The camera then descends a set of stairs, shifting from the cluttered alleyway into an open pedestrian plaza marked by a prominent Japanese neon hotel sign and groups of idling citizens. As the path opens further, the scene flows onto a bustling commercial street filled with vibrant billboards and overhead wires before turning right onto a curved ramp adorned with bright pink graffiti. Finally, the camera climbs between towering buildings to reach a high vantage point, revealing a sprawling urban landscape of holographic advertisements and complex highway interchanges under the bright morning sun.
